title: Knot Mage
pitch: Draw a rope stroke — how many times it crosses itself IS the spell.
howto: Drag to draw a strand and release to cast: no crossings wards you, one crossing fires a bolt, more curls mean bigger magic. Casting spends rope that regrows. Grind fiber from foes to buy longer rope, silk, wire and runethread, and fill your grimoire of knots.
controls: Drag anywhere to draw, release to cast. Everything else is tap.
